---
title: "pittsburgh_sleep_quality_index_psqi"
subtitle: "`pittsburgh_sleep_quality_index_psqi`"
description: "pittsburgh_sleep_quality_index_psqi"
---

<!--
NEVER EDIT MANUALLY. This documentation was auto-generated by `seedcase-flower`.
If you want to edit the content, please make changes to the `datapackage.json` file.
-->

- Path: `resources/pittsburgh_sleep_quality_index_psqi/data.parquet`
- Primary key: (`event`)

| Name                           | Title                        | Type   | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|--------------------------------|------------------------------|--------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `event`                        | The unique name of the event | string | The unique name identifying the event when the form was filled in.                                                                                                                                              |
| `center`                       | Research center              | string | The research center where the data item was recorded.                                                                                                                                                           |
| `psqi_1_bedtime`               | psqi_1_bedtime               | time   | Usual bedtime over the past month. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                     |
| `psqi_2_sleep_latency_min`     | psqi_2_sleep_latency_min     | number | Usual time (in minutes) it takes the participant to fall asleep over the past month. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                   |
| `psqi_3_wake_time`             | psqi_3_wake_time             | time   | Usual wake-up time over the past month. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                |
| `psqi_4_sleep_duration_h`      | psqi_4_sleep_duration_h      | number | Number of hours of actual sleep per night over the past month. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                         |
| `psqi_5a_latency_30m`          | psqi_5a_latency_30m          | string | Pittsburgh Sleep Quality Index.. Frequency of trouble falling asleep within 30 minutes over the past month. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).            |
| `psqi_5b_wake`                 | psqi_5b_wake                 | string | Frequency of waking during the night or early morning over the past month. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                             |
| `psqi_5c_urinate`              | psqi_5c_urinate              | string | Frequency of waking up to urinate one or more times during the night over the past month. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                              |
| `psqi_5d_breathing`            | psqi_5d_breathing            | string | Frequency of trouble breathing properly during sleep over the past month. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                              |
| `psqi_5e_cough_snore`          | psqi_5e_cough_snore          | string | Frequency of coughing or loud snoring during sleep over the past month. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                |
| `psqi_5f_too_cold`             | psqi_5f_too_cold             | string | Frequency of trouble sleeping due to the environment being too cold over the past month. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                               |
| `psqi_5g_too_hot`              | psqi_5g_too_hot              | string | Frequency of trouble sleeping due to the environment being too hot over the past month. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                |
| `psqi_5h_nightmares`           | psqi_5h_nightmares           | string | Frequency of trouble sleeping due to nightmares over the past month. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                   |
| `psqi_5i_pain`                 | psqi_5i_pain                 | string | Frequency of trouble sleeping due to pain over the past month. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                         |
| `psqi_trouble_sleep_other`     | psqi_trouble_sleep_other     | string | Participant reports other reasons for trouble sleeping not listed above. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                               |
| `psqi_6_overall_sleep_quality` | psqi_6_overall_sleep_quality | string | Participant's self-rated overall sleep quality over the past month. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                    |
| `psqi_7_medication`            | psqi_7_medication            | string | Frequency of taking medication (prescription or over-the-counter) to help sleep over the past month. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                   |
| `psqi_8_dysfunction`           | psqi_8_dysfunction           | string | Frequency of trouble staying awake during driving, eating meals, or engaging in social activities over the past month. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10). |
| `psqi_9_enthusiasm`            | psqi_9_enthusiasm            | string | Participant's assessment of difficulty maintaining enthusiasm to get things done during the day over the past month. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).   |
| `psqi_10_sleep_chronotype`     | psqi_10_sleep_chronotype     | string | Participant's self-assessed sleep chronotype (morning-type or evening-type). Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                           |

: Fields in the `pittsburgh_sleep_quality_index_psqi` resource.
